todaysPlan.reason: CRITICAL: 21 days overdue. Ila avoided this probe 4/5 and resisted 4/4. Must determine if she has true phonemic awareness or relies on word-family pattern matching. Without this baseline, all decoding work is built on unverified assumptions.
todaysPlan.method: Word Builder game format with visual sound boxes
probeSequence: Ask: Tell me all three sounds

The dog is fast. The cat is ___. The rabbit is the ___.

todaysPlan.reason: Ila prefers reading to phoneme work. Must assess if she decodes novel words or relies on whole-word memorization. Sessions 4/4-4/5 show reading engagement but phoneme avoidance.

skipConditions: If Ila completes required activities and requests reading reward time

childProfile: Ila is 8y3m with ADHD + dyslexia. She actively avoids phoneme segmentation tasks (deferred 4/5, resisted 4/4) but engages with narrative reading and spelling games. CELF-5 shows strength in Sentence Comprehension (63rd) but severe deficits in Following Directions (2nd), Recalling Sentences (5th), Word Structure (5th). She requires visual support (100% accuracy with pictures vs 37% without), single-step instructions, and breaks every 10-15 minutes. Homework includes comparative/superlative morphology (-er/-est) she will struggle with due to Word Structure deficit. IEP-mandated baseline probes on Following Directions and Recalling Sentences are 21+ days overdue with zero execution despite 31 and 27 planning mentions. Mixed-vowel discrimination diagnostic is the gate-keeper for all future phoneme work but has been avoided for 21 days.
stopAfter: 30 minutes total or when Ila shows fatigue ('I'm gonna go to bed now') or requests to stop. If mixed-vowel diagnostic probe reveals <60% accuracy, stop phoneme work immediately and pivot to morphology instruction only.
rewardPolicy: Ila responds well to game-based learning (Word Builder, spell-check) and narrative reading as rewards. Offer 5-minute reading time after completing required activities 1-2. Do not use games as bribes before work; structure as earned consequences after effort. If she avoids mixed-vowel probe again, do not force—pivot to homework morphology support and document avoidance pattern for method change recommendation.
